summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin Extended Features. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages verified working: Subscriptions (4 plan cards, subscriptions table, create modal), Users (hotel sidebar, users table, invite modal), Invoices (4 KPIs, filters, generate modal), Hotel Detail (info, subscription, signatures, PDF buttons).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/superadmin/invoices returns invoice list (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/invoices?hotel_id=xxx filters by hotel (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/invoices?status=draft filters by status (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/invoices/generate creates invoice with FACT-YYYYMM-XXX number (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/invoices/{id}/pdf generates PDF (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/signature/send endpoint exists (returns 200 or 503 if not configured)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/signature/requests/{hotel_id} returns signature list (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels/{hotel_id}/users returns users list (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels/{hotel_id}/users/invite creates invitation (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/superadmin/users/{user_id} removes user (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels/{hotel_id} returns full hotel details (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels/{hotel_id}/contract/pdf returns PDF (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels/{hotel_id}/sepa-mandate/pdf returns PDF (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/plans returns 4 plans (Basic/Pro/Premium/Enterprise) (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels returns hotels with subscription info (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/subscriptions creates subscription with all options (200)
Backend: PATCH /api/superadmin/subscriptions/{id}/cancel cancels subscription (200)
Frontend: /superadmin/subscriptions displays 4 plan cards (Basic 99€, Pro 199€, Premium 349€, Enterprise 599€)
Frontend: Subscriptions page shows active subscriptions list with plan badges
Frontend: 'Nouvel abonnement' modal opens with hotel/plan/frequency selection
Frontend: /superadmin/users shows hotels list on left sidebar (14 hotels)
Frontend: Users page shows hotel users table when hotel selected
Frontend: 'Inviter un utilisateur' modal opens with role selection (7 roles)
Frontend: /superadmin/invoices displays 4 KPI cards (Total HT, Total TTC, En attente, Factures ce mois)
Frontend: Invoices page has hotel and status filters
Frontend: 'Générer une facture' modal works with hotel selection
Frontend: /superadmin/hotels/:id detail page shows hotel info, subscription, signatures
Frontend: Hotel detail has 'Contrat PDF' and 'Mandat SEPA' download buttons
Frontend: Hotel detail has 'Signature électronique' button opening modal with document type, signer email/name fields
critical_code_review_comments: Missing data-testid attributes on interactive elements in SAPages.jsx - recommend adding for better testability
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed hotels during testing. Grand Hotel Paris (691777ca-2ad0-4412-87f2-3f3fbb3ae1d0) remains as seed data with Pro subscription.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin Extended Features fully tested. New pages: SASubscriptions (4 plan cards with prices, subscriptions table with plan/status badges), SAUsers (hotel selector sidebar, users table, invite modal with 7 roles), SAInvoices (4 KPIs, hotel/status filters, invoice generation), SAHotelDetail (hotel info, subscription details, signature requests list, PDF download buttons, signature modal). Dropbox Sign integration implemented - endpoint returns 200 when configured or 503 when not. Invoice PDF generation working with FACT-YYYYMM-XXX format.

mocked_apis.note: Dropbox Sign requires paid plan for sending to external emails in test mode - endpoint exists and works but may return 503 if API key not configured

subscriptions_page.subscriptions_table: Shows hotel name, plan badge, status badge, users count, end date
subscriptions_page.create_modal: Hotel selection, plan selection, frequency (monthly/annual), trial type, custom options

users_page.hotel_sidebar: Lists all hotels with user counts
users_page.users_table: Shows user name, email, role, status, created date
users_page.invite_modal: First name, last name, email, role selection (7 roles)

hotel_detail_page.signature_modal: Document type, signer email, signer name, test mode checkbox

signature_api.status: Working - returns 200 when Dropbox Sign configured, 503 otherwise
